label: Bullish
explanation: 8/10 is bullish from a 7-day headline keyword scan. Bullish drivers: Dominic Chu: The Trump Bull Market’s AI Rally Is Powering the S&P 500 Toward an 8th Straight Winning Week; Arm shares extend weekly rally to almost 50%, and Starbucks pulls the plug on an AI project. Bearish offsets: Trump said he'd 'remember' companies that didn't apply for tariff refunds. Many of them are anyway.

articles.title: Dominic Chu: The Trump Bull Market’s AI Rally Is Powering the S&P 500 Toward an 8th Straight Winning Week
Arm shares extend weekly rally to almost 50%, and Starbucks pulls the plug on an AI project
Dell Stock Leads the S&P 500 Today. Next Week’s Earnings Could Send It Higher.
Trump said he'd 'remember' companies that didn't apply for tariff refunds. Many of them are anyway

Bullish sentiment on Wall Street continues to surge! Following Morgan Stanley, UBS Group has also raised its year-end target for the S&P 500, citing AI-driven earnings growth and resilient consumer spending as key supports for its bullish outlook. - Moomoo

data_source.method: RSS headlines from the last 7 days scored with weighted bullish/bearish keyword lists.

limitations: Headline-based keyword heuristic, not investment advice.
Not part of the mechanical default signal unless explicitly added later.
Free RSS feeds can be incomplete and delayed.
